alerts.description: SSL traffic was observed. Legacy SSL should be reviewed.

alerts.title: QUIC Activity
alerts.description: Modern encrypted QUIC traffic was observed.

correlations.title: Legacy SSL Detected
correlations.description: SSL traffic was observed. Legacy SSL should be reviewed.

correlations.title: QUIC Traffic Detected
correlations.description: Modern encrypted QUIC traffic was observed.

liveSummary:
Key observations:
* MDNS and QUIC protocols dominate, indicating potential local network discovery and encrypted traffic.
* Top sources and destinations suggest communication between local devices and external servers.
* Protocol distribution: 20% MDNS, 15% QUIC, 10% TCP, and 5% TLSv1.2, suggesting a mix of local and encrypted traffic.
* Uncertainty exists regarding the nature of the traffic due to limited information.
* Notable observation: presence of TLSv1.2, SSL, and QUIC indicates encrypted traffic.
